<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[ja:大坂山口神社 (香芝市逢坂)]]
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Expand Japanese|大坂山口神社 (香芝市逢坂)}}

{{Infobox religious building
| name = Oosakayamaguchi Shrine (Katsuge district)
| native_name = 大坂山口神社
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Oosakayamaguchi Shrine (Katsuge district)
| coordinates = {{coord|34.54786|135.691766}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Oosakayamaguchi Shrine (Katsuge district)'''|大坂山口神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Yamato Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|WD=Q845945}}
* {{ill|Shrine receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|lt=Shrine receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings|WD=Q135009132}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}}
* {{ill|Shikinai Taisha|lt=Shikinai Taisha|en|Shikinai Taisha|ja|式内大社|simple|Shikinai Taisha|WD=Q134917288}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|WD=Q134917286}}
** Series ordinal: 182
* {{ill|Kanpei-sha|lt=Kanpei-sha|simple|Kanpei-sha|WD=Q135160338}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=180736</ref>
* {{ill|Engishiki seat|lt=Engishiki seat|WD=Q135018062}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=180736</ref>
** Series ordinal: 195
* {{ill|Junior Fifth Rank|lt=Junior Fifth Rank|ja|従五位|ko|종5위|zh|從五位|WD=Q11071125}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=180736</ref>
* {{ill|Senior Fifth Rank|lt=Senior Fifth Rank|ja|正五位|ko|정5위|zh|正五位|WD=Q11123280}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=180736</ref>
* {{ill|Q135206478|lt=Q135206478|WD=Q135206478}}
* {{ill|Q135206477|lt=Q135206477|WD=Q135206477}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Yamato Province|ja|大和国の式内社一覧|WD=Q11433427}}
** Series ordinal: 77
** P155: {{ill|Taimayamakuchino Shrine|lt=Taimayamakuchino Shrine|WD=Q135038959}}
** P156: {{ill|Katsuragi Futakami Shrine|lt=Katsuragi Futakami Shrine|ja|葛木二上神社|WD=Q11620952}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Yamato Province|lt=Yamato Province|be|Ямата (правінцыя)|ca|Província de Yamato|ckb|پارێزگای یەماتۆ|cs|Provincie Jamato|de|Provinz Yamato|el|Επαρχία Γιαμάτο|en|Yamato Province|es|Provincia de Yamato|fa|ولایت یاماتو|fi|Yamaton provinssi|fr|Province de Yamato|gl|Provincia de Yamato|hak|Yamato-koet|id|Provinsi Yamato|it|Yamato (provincia)|ja|大和国|ko|야마토국|lt|Jamato žemė|nl|Yamato (provincie)|no|Yamato (provins)|pt|Província de Yamato|ro|Provincia Yamato|ru|Ямато (провинция)|simple|Yamato Province|sk|Jamato (provincia)|sr|Провинција Јамато|th|แคว้นยามาโตะ|tr|Yamato (vilayet)|uk|Провінція Ямато|ur|یاماتو صوبہ|zh_min_nan|Yamato-kok|zh_yue|大和國|zh|大和國|WD=Q907495}}
* {{ill|Katsuge district|lt=Katsuge district|ja|葛下郡|zh|葛下郡|WD=Q11620862}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|34.54786|135.691766}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=180736</ref>

== described by source (P1343) ==

* {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database (old)|WD=Q135037878}}
** P2699: https://web.archive.org/web/20041122180739/http://21coe.kokugakuin.ac.jp:80/db/jinja/kindex2.php?J_ID=22712

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 180736
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|WD=Q135159299}}

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Ohosakanoyamakuchi Shrine|lt=Ohosakanoyamakuchi Shrine|WD=Q135038960}}
* {{ill|Ohosakanoyamakuchi Shrine|lt=Ohosakanoyamakuchi Shrine|WD=Q135038960}}<ref>Kokugakuin University Shrine database (Q135159299) https://jmapps.ne.jp/kokugakuin/det.html?data_id=180736</ref>
** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|WD=Q135022904}}

==References==

[[Category:Shrine receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]]
[[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]]
[[Category:Shikinai Taisha]]
[[Category:Shikinaisha]]
[[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]]
[[Category:Senior Fifth Rank]]
[[Category:Shikinaisha in Yamato Province]]

[[JA:大坂山口神社 (香芝市逢坂)]]

{{wikidata link|Q135069036}}
[[Category:Junior Fifth Rank]]
[[Category:Senior Fifth Rank]]
[[Category:Shikinai Taisha]]
[[Category:Shrine receiving Tsukinami-sai and Niiname-sai offerings]]
[[Category:Kanpei-sha]]

{{translated page|ja|大坂山口神社 (香芝市逢坂)|version=106898774|comment=Imported full ja history}}
== Japanese Wikipedia content ==
{{神社
|名称   = 大坂山口神社
|画像 = [[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (osaka)2.jpg|250px]]<br />拝殿<br />{{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|marker=religious-shinto|zoom=13|frame-align=center|frame-width=250}}
|所在地 = {{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}{{jalink|逢坂 (香芝市)||逢坂}}5-831
|位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}}
|祭神   = {{jalink|大山祇命}}、{{jalink|須佐之男命}}、{{jalink|神大市比売命}}
|社格   = {{jalink|式内社}}論社、旧{{jalink|村社}}
|創建   = 
|本殿   = 
|別名   = 
|札所等 = 
|例祭   = 10月16日
|神事   = 
|地図 = {{Location map|Japan Nara|label=大坂<br />山口神社|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}}
}}
[[File:Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja (osaka)1.jpg|thumb|250px|鳥居と拝殿]]
'''大坂山口神社'''（おおさかやまぐちじんじゃ）は、{{jalink|奈良県|Q131287}}{{jalink|香芝市|Q696643}}{{jalink|逢坂 (香芝市)||逢坂}}（おうさか）にある{{jalink|神社|Q845945}}。

== 概要 ==
{{jalink|近鉄大阪線|Q1052545}}の{{jalink|二上駅|Q7034597}}の北東近隣に鎮座している。

穴虫地区の{{jalink|大坂山口神社 (香芝市穴虫)|Q135069035|大坂山口神社}}と共に、『{{jalink|古事記|Q813031}}』『{{jalink|日本書紀|Q813935}}』の{{jalink|崇神天皇|Q333530}}9年の記述にある「赤盾八枚・赤矛八竿を以て墨坂神（すみさかのかみ）を祠り、黒盾八枚・黒矛八竿を以て大坂神（おおさかのかみ）を祠れ」という夢告における、大坂神を祠った神社に比定されている（ちなみに、墨坂神（すみさかのかみ）は{{jalink|宇陀市|Q863747}}の{{jalink|墨坂神社 (宇陀市)||墨坂神社}}に比定されている）<ref name="city-muse">[https://www.city.kashiba.lg.jp/uploaded/attachment/1655.pdf 逢坂・大坂山口神社] - 香芝市二上山博物館</ref><ref name="pref-db">[https://www.pref.nara.jp/miryoku/ikasu-nara/bunkashigen/main00217.html 大坂山口神社本殿、神像群及び宝物類(大坂山口神社本殿、大坂山口神社神像及び宝物類)] - 奈良県歴史文化資源データベース</ref>。

また、同じく穴虫地区の大坂山口神社と共に、{{jalink|大和国の式内社一覧|Q11433427|大和国の式内社}}の1つである大坂山口神社の論社となっている<ref name="city-muse"/><ref name="pref-db"/>。

== 祭神 ==
* {{jalink|大山祇命}}
* {{jalink|須佐之男命}}
* {{jalink|神大市比売命}}

== 脚注 ==
{{Reflist}}

== 外部リンク ==
* {{Commonscat-inline|Osaka-yamaguchi-jinja}}

{{shinto-stub}}


==End Japanese==
[[Category:奈良県の旧村社]]
[[Category:香芝市の建築物]]
[[Category:香芝市の歴史]]
[[Category:大和国の式内社]][[Category:Need translation]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
[[Category:Pages with 50+ untranslated japanese characters]]
[[Category:Pages with 100+ untranslated japanese characters]]
[[Category:Pages with 150+ untranslated japanese characters]]
[[Category:Pages with 200+ untranslated japanese characters]]
